linear_elastic_3d.description: Linear elastic isotropic solid (3D). Small-strain Hooke's law.

linear_elastic_plane_strain.description: Linear elastic isotropic solid, 2D plane-strain assumption.

linear_elastic_plane_stress.description: Linear elastic isotropic solid, 2D plane-stress assumption (thin sheets).

small_strain_plasticity_von_mises_3d.description: Small-strain isotropic J2 (Von Mises) plasticity, 3D. Metals below finite-strain regime. Needs ConstitutiveLawsApplication.

finite_strain_plasticity_von_mises_3d.description: Finite-strain isotropic Von Mises plasticity, 3D. Large plastic deformation of metals. Needs ConstitutiveLawsApplication.

small_strain_damage_von_mises_3d.description: Small-strain isotropic Von Mises damage, 3D. Stiffness degradation / softening. Needs ConstitutiveLawsApplication.

newtonian_fluid_2d.description: Newtonian incompressible fluid (2D). Constant dynamic viscosity.

newtonian_fluid_3d.description: Newtonian incompressible fluid (3D). Constant dynamic viscosity.
